Cost breakdown

What it really costs, all-in

DirectScribe's software fee is fixed. The rest is your own vendor spend, which you can see and control. These static tables use figures verified in July 2026 for a solo outpatient practice of roughly 440 notes per month.

These are estimates, not quotes. Vendor prices change; audio length, note length, and patient volume all move the number. Treat the ~440-notes column as the anchor and the lighter/heavier columns as scaled estimates. Re-check the current rates with each vendor before you rely on them.

Transcription (speech → text)

You send the physician's audio to one cloud vendor. This is usually the larger of your two API costs.

Estimated monthly transcription cost, CAD. Scales roughly with audio minutes.
Vendor~200 notes~440 notes~800 notesNotes
Deepgram (nova-3-medical)~$4~$8~$15Lowest-cost medical model. Recommended default.
ElevenLabs (Scribe)~$4–6~$7–12~$13–22Comparable quality; slightly higher and more variable.
AWS Transcribe Medical~$64~$141~$256Coming soon For maximum-compliance practices; ca-central-1.

Note-shaping (text → your template)

The transcript is shaped into your template by an intelligence vendor. This step is cheap on a mid-tier model — or free of API cost if you run it locally.

Estimated monthly note-shaping cost, CAD, at ~440 notes.
Vendor / model~200 notes~440 notes~800 notesNotes
Claude (mid-tier)~$1–4~$2–8~$4–15BAA status for small customers is being verified — see the guide.
OpenAI GPT (mid-tier)~$1–4~$2–8~$4–15BAA available to individuals by email.
LM Studio (local model)$0$0$0No API cost — runs on your Mac. You provide the hardware and power.

All-in stacks versus the incumbents

Add the fixed $39/month software fee (or $33.25 on the annual plan) to your vendor spend. Even the middle of the range lands well under the all-inclusive competitors.

All-in monthly cost at ~440 notes, CAD unless noted. Competitor prices are published subscriptions.
StackSoftwareAPIAll-in
DirectScribe + Deepgram + local (LM Studio)$39~$8~$47
DirectScribe + Deepgram + Claude/GPT$39~$10–16~$49–55
DirectScribe + ElevenLabs + Claude/GPT$39~$9–20~$48–59
Heidi Health—incl.$150 USD
Scribeberry—incl.$99 USD
Tali AI—incl.$135–150
Dragon Medical One—incl.$109 + setup (Windows)

Review cadence

Vendor pricing and endpoints were verified on 2026-07-02. Prices drift. These tables are reviewed on the same monthly cadence as the app; if a vendor changes rates, the figures here are updated at the next pass.

Start your 7-day trial Set up Deepgram
DirectScribe

A Mac-native, bring-your-own-API-key dictation app for solo outpatient primary-care physicians in Canada. Built by a physician.

Not legal advice. DirectScribe is a documentation tool. Compliance materials on this site are general information to help you and your privacy advisor do your own assessment under PIPEDA and your province's health-privacy law (e.g., PHIPA in Ontario). They are not legal advice and do not create any professional relationship.

© 2026 DirectScribe · Made for macOS · This site runs no scripts and sets no cookies. · directscribe.ca
